title: [Control Systems] Moxa security advisory (AV26-610)
description: On June 16, 2026, Moxa published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: NPort 6000-G2 Series - version v1.1.0 and prior
NPort W2150A-W4/W2250A-W4 Series - firmware version v1.5 and prior
NPort W2150A/W2250A Series - firmware version v2.3 and prior
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
